prediction.reasoning: As an AI, I do not have real-time access to current market data, financial news, or the ability to run predictive financial models. Stock prices are highly volatile and influenced by a multitude of unpredictable factors (economic indicators, company news, market sentiment, geopolitical events, etc.). These are NOT derived from actual TMO-specific analysis or real-time data, but merely represent a mathematical calculation to fulfill the request format, emphasizing the high inherent uncertainty in stock market predictions. This information should NOT be considered financial advice.
